profile.summary: B2B SaaS AE with outbound and enterprise pipeline experience.

jobDescription: PulseMetrics seeks an Enterprise Account Executive to run outbound, manage Salesforce pipeline, run discovery, and close mid-market deals. Quota ownership and crisp negotiation skills required.
cvText:
Jordan Blake
Account Executive

Experience:
- AE at CloudNest SaaS (2020-2025), 120% of quota in 2024
- Built outbound sequences and ran discovery calls
- Managed full Salesforce pipeline for 40 accounts

Skills: Salesforce, outbound prospecting, negotiation, MEDDIC basics
Education: BSc Business Administration, Westbrook University
baselineCoverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am applying for the Enterprise Account Executive role at PulseMetrics. At CloudNest SaaS I owned quota, ran outbound and discovery, and managed Salesforce pipeline for dozens of accounts, finishing 2024 at 120% of quota.

I would like to bring that disciplined enterprise selling approach to your team.

Sincerely,
Jordan Blake
